---

## Overview

> High-performance landing page with scroll animations.

**skylight landing page** is an advanced web application system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Vite, React, Express.js.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Browser Client"] -->|"HTTPS"| B["React SPA + Vite HMR"];
    B -->|"Component Render"| C["Interactive UI Layer"];
    C -->|"API"| D["Express.js Server"];
    D --> E[(Database)];

    style A fill:#001a00,stroke:#39ff14,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#002200,stroke:#39ff14,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style C fill:#003300,stroke:#39ff14,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
skylight-landing-page/
  .gitignore
  GITHUB_AUTH_GUIDE.md
  GMAIL_SETUP_GUIDE.md
  LICENSE
  NETLIFY_EMAIL_SETUP.md
  README.md
  RESERVATION_SETUP_GUIDE.md
  TEST_RESULTS.md
  .github/
    copilot-instructions.md
  api/
    reservations.js
  public/
    vite.svg
  src/
    App.css
    App.jsx
    ReservationAdmin.jsx
    index.css
```

<br/>

|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `JavaScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Web Application` |
| **Total Source Files** | `30` |
| **Frameworks** | `Vite`, `React`, `Express.js` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

<p align="left">
  <code>@types/react</code>  <code>cors</code>  <code>@eslint/js</code>  <code>@types/react-dom</code>  <code>@vitejs/plugin-react</code>  <code>express</code>  <code>eslint-plugin-react-refresh</code>  <code>react-dom</code>  <code>emailjs-com</code>  <code>eslint</code>  <code>eslint-plugin-react-hooks</code>  <code>nodemailer</code>  <code>@emailjs/browser</code>  <code>vite</code>  <code>globals</code>
</p>
